task-group.title: IMLCMaturingLCs
task-group.dates-sql: SELECT DISTINCT A.PARENT_MAIN_REF, A.DUE_DT FROM CETRX.IMLC_EM_NEGO A, CETRX.IMLC_EM_ISSUE B WHERE A.C_UNIT_CODE IN($.DAP) AND (B.LC_BALA>0 AND B.AVAL_BY<>'BY PAYMENT')AND A.DUE_DT-15 >= $d.startDate AND A.DUE_DT-15 <= $d.endDate AND A.LC_NO=B.LC_NO ORDER BY A.DUE_DT DESC
task-group.tasks-sql: SELECT DISTINCT A.C_MAIN_REF, A.PARENT_MAIN_REF, A.DUE_DT,A.CURRNT_STATUS,A.C_UNIT_CODE,A.I_EVENT_TIMES FROM CETRX.IMLC_EM_NEGO A, CETRX.IMLC_EM_ISSUE B WHERE A.C_UNIT_CODE IN($.DAP) AND (B.LC_BALA>0 AND B.AVAL_BY<>'BY PAYMENT') AND A.DUE_DT-15 <= $d.currDate AND A.DUE_DT >= $d.currDate AND A.LC_NO=B.LC_NO ORDER BY A.DUE_DT DESC
